content:
You are a Claude-Mem, a specialized observer tool for creating searchable memory FOR FUTURE SESSIONS.

CRITICAL: Record what was LEARNED/BUILT/FIXED/DEPLOYED/CONFIGURED, not what you (the observer) are doing.

You do not have access to tools. All information you need is provided in <observed_from_primary_session> messages. Create observations from what you observe - no investigation needed.

<observed_from_primary_session>
  <user_request>幫我檢查一下有哪些還可以針對GC和效能優化，請勿直接修改</user_request>
  <requested_at>2026-07-07</requested_at>
</observed_from_primary_session>

Your job is to monitor a different Claude Code session happening RIGHT NOW, with the goal of creating observations and progress summaries as the work is being done LIVE by the user. You are NOT the one doing the work - you are ONLY observing and recording what is being built, fixed, deployed, or configured in the other session.

SPATIAL AWARENESS: Tool executions include the working directory (tool_cwd) to help you understand:
- Which repository/project is being worked on
- Where files are located relative to the project root
- How to match requested paths to actual execution paths

WHAT TO RECORD
--------------
Focus on deliverables and capabilities:
- What the system NOW DOES differently (new capabilities)
- What shipped to users/production (features, fixes, configs, docs)
- Changes in technical domains (auth, data, UI, infra, DevOps, docs)

Use verbs like: implemented, fixed, deployed, configured, migrated, optimized, added, refactored

✅ GOOD EXAMPLES (describes what was built):
- "Authentication now supports OAuth2 with PKCE flow"
- "Deployment pipeline runs canary releases with auto-rollback"
- "Database indexes optimized for common query patterns"

❌ BAD EXAMPLES (describes observation process - DO NOT DO THIS):
- "Analyzed authentication implementation and stored findings"
- "Tracked deployment steps and logged outcomes"
- "Monitored database performance and recorded metrics"

WHEN TO SKIP
------------
Skip routine operations:
- Empty status checks
- Package installations with no errors
- Simple file listings
- Repetitive operations you've already documented
- If file related research comes back as empty or not found
- **No output necessary if skipping.**

OUTPUT FORMAT
-------------
Output observations using this XML structure:

```xml
<observation>
  <type>[ bugfix | feature | refactor | change | discovery | decision ]</type>
  <!--
    **type**: MUST be EXACTLY one of these 6 options (no other values allowed):
      - bugfix: something was broken, now fixed
      - feature: new capability or functionality added
      - refactor: code restructured, behavior unchanged
      - change: generic modification (docs, config, misc)
      - discovery: learning about existing system
      - decision: architectural/design choice with rationale
  -->
  <title>[**title**: Short title capturing the core action or topic]</title>
  <subtitle>[**subtitle**: One sentence explanation (max 24 words)]</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
  </facts>
  <!--
    **facts**: Concise, self-contained statements
Each fact is ONE piece of information
      No pronouns - each fact must stand alone
      Include specific details: filenames, functions, values

**files**: All files touched (full paths from project root)
  -->
  <narrative>[**narrative**: Full context: What was done, how it works, why it matters]</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
  </concepts>
  <!--
    **concepts**: 2-5 knowledge-type categories. MUST use ONLY these exact keywords:
      - how-it-works: understanding mechanisms
      - why-it-exists: purpose or rationale
      - what-changed: modifications made
      - problem-solution: issues and their fixes
      - gotcha: traps or edge cases
      - pattern: reusable approach
      - trade-off: pros/cons of a decision

    IMPORTANT: Do NOT include the observation type (change/discovery/decision) as a concept.
    Types and concepts are separate dimensions.
  -->
  <files_read>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>
```


IMPORTANT! DO NOT do any work right now other than generating this OBSERVATIONS from tool use messages - and remember that you are a memory agent designed to summarize a DIFFERENT claude code session, not this one.

Never reference yourself or your own actions. Do not output anything other than the observation content formatted in the XML structure above. All other output is ignored by the system, and the system has been designed to be smart about token usage. Please spend your tokens wisely on useful observations.

Remember that we record these observations as a way of helping us stay on track with our progress, and to help us keep important decisions and changes at the forefront of our minds! :) Thank you so much for your help!

MEMORY PROCESSING START
=======================

  <outcome>"{\"type\":\"text\",\"file\":{\"filePath\":\"G:\\\\Cocos_Project\\\\uk_pirates_queen\\\\assets\\\\Script\\\\SlotReels.ts\",\"content\":\"    {\\n        return this.m_reelDirection === ReelDirection.Up ? 1 : -1;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 計算該轉輪轉一圈時間 - 彈性轉輪系統修正\\n     * @param col 列索引 (0 ~ Game_Define.COL-1)\\n     * @param isNearWin 是否為近贏\\n     * @returns 轉一圈時間\\n     */\\n    CalSpinTime(col: number, isNearWin: boolean) : number\\n    {\\n        // 使用實際符號數量\\n        const actualSymbolCount = this.GetTargetSymbolCount( col );\\n        const speedUp = (isNearWin && this.m_nearWinSpeedUp[col] > 1) ? this.m_nearWinSpeedUp[col] : 1;\\n        return this.m_spinTime * ( actualSymbolCount / Game_Define.MAX_ROW ) / speedUp;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 把錯誤的數據轉正\\n     * @param num 數字\\n     * @param precision 精度\\n     * @returns 轉正後的數字\\n     */\\n    ToolsStrip( num: number, precision?: number ) : number\\n    {\\n        try\\n        {\\n            // 優先使用 tools.strip 方法\\n            if ( tools && typeof tools.strip === 'function' )\\n            {\\n                return tools.strip( num, precision );\\n            }\\n        }\\n        catch ( error )\\n        {\\n            warn( \\\"tools.strip 無法使用，使用備用方法:\\\", error );\\n        }\\n\\n        // 備用實作：處理浮點數精度問題\\n        if ( typeof num !== 'number' || isNaN( num ) )\\n        {\\n            return num;\\n        }\\n\\n        // 如果沒有指定精度，使用預設精度 12\\n        const defaultPrecision = precision !== undefined ? precision : 12;\\n        \\n        // 使用 parseFloat 和 toPrecision 來處理精度問題\\n        const result = parseFloat( num.toPrecision( defaultPrecision ) );\\n        \\n        return result;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 計算點擊停止按鈕後的轉輪停止時間\\n     * @param time 時間\\n     * @returns 轉輪停止時間\\n     */\\n    CalClickStopButtonFinishTime( time: number ) : number\\n    {\\n        let timeOfSpine = Math.ceil( time / this.m_spinTime );\\n        let stopTime = 0;\\n        if (tempoSetting)\\n        {\\n            stopTime = tempoSetting.TempoSetting.TripleCoinTreasure.SPEED_UP_STOP_TIME( 0, time );\\n        }\\n        else\\n        {\\n            stopTime = ( timeOfSpine + 2 ) * this.m_spinTime;\\n        }\\n        return this.ToolsStrip( stopTime );\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@ch 初始化值 */\\n    InitValue()\\n    {\\n        if ( this.m_isInitValueFinish )\\n        {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        this.m_viewSize = this.node.getComponent( UITransform ).contentSize;\\n\\n        this.m_symbolSize = new Size( Game_Define.SymbolWidth, Game_Define.SymbolHeight );\\n\\n        // 計算(下、中、上)每個轉輪的比較(交換符號)位置\\n        this.UpdateComparePosArray();\\n    \\n        // 初始化各轉輪Y座標偏移量\\n        this.m_reelYOffset = [];\\n        for ( let col = 0; col < Game_Define.COL; ++col )\\n        {\\n            this.m_reelYOffset[ col ] = ( col < this.m_reelYOffsetProperty.length ) ? this.m_reelYOffsetProperty[ col ] : 0;\\n        }\\n\\n        // 計算(下、中、上)每個轉輪的Y座標\\n        this.UpdateReelYPositions();\\n    \\n        // 計算並更新所有轉輪的X座標位置\\n        const middleMaskNode = this.m_reelMask;\\n        const middleMaskNodeViewSize = middleMaskNode.getComponent( UITransform ).contentSize;\\n        this.UpdateReelXPositions( middleMaskNodeViewSize );\\n\\n        // 計算每轉輪(下、中、上相加)總長度 - 彈性轉輪系統修正\\n        this.UpdateTotalLengths();\\n\\n        this.m_isInitValueFinish = true;\\n\\n        \\n    }\\n\\n    start()\\n    {\\n        // 載入假轉輪帶資料\\n\\n        // 設定假轉輪帶隨機行數位置\\n\\n    }\\n\",\"numLines\":120,\"startLine\":625,\"totalLines\":4032}}"</outcome>
</observed_from_primary_session>

  <outcome>"{\"type\":\"text\",\"file\":{\"filePath\":\"G:\\\\Cocos_Project\\\\uk_pirates_queen\\\\assets\\\\Script\\\\FreeGame\\\\FGRouletteManager.ts\",\"content\":\"import { _decorator, Animation, AnimationClip, Button, Color, error, EventKeyboard, Input, input, KeyCode, log, Node, sp, Sprite, SpriteFrame, tween, UIOpacity, Vec3, warn } from 'cc';\\nimport { eventManager } from 'db://astarte-framework/Managers';\\nimport { Define } from 'db://astarte-framework/utilis';\\nimport { DEBUG } from 'cc/env';\\nimport { RouletteRotate } from '../Common/RouletteRotate';\\nimport { Common } from '../Common/Common';\\nimport SpineKit from 'db://astarte-framework/Component/Spine/SpineKit';\\nimport { NewBoneFollow } from 'db://astarte-framework/Component/Spine/New/NewBoneFollow';\\nimport { AudioManager } from '../Audio/AudioManager';\\nimport { FREE_GAME_UI_MANAGER_EVENT } from './FreeGameUIManager';\\n\\nconst { ccclass, property } = _decorator;\\n\\n// ─────────────────────────────────────────────\\n//  事件定義\\n// ─────────────────────────────────────────────\\nexport const FG_ROULETTE_MANAGER_EVENT = {\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 開啟轉盤畫面，並儲存指針數量與各指針的獲獎結果（不立即旋轉）\\n     * @param pointerCount number             — 指針數量（SCATTER 3→1, 4→2, 5+→3）\\n     * @param spinResults  FGRouletteOption[] — 各指針的最終獲獎結果（長度需等於 pointerCount）\\n     * @param callback     () => void         — 旋轉停止後呼叫（可選）\\n     */\\n    OPEN: 'FG_ROULETTE_MANAGER_OPEN',\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 直接顯示 UPGRADES 面板（不旋轉）\\n     * @param spinResults FGRouletteOption[] — 獲獎結果\\n     * @param callback () => void — 面板關閉後呼叫\\n     */\\n    SHOW_UPGRADES: 'FG_ROULETTE_MANAGER_SHOW_UPGRADES',\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 旋轉結束後廣播\\n     * @param spinResults FGRouletteOption[] — 本次各指針的獲獎結果（與 OPEN 傳入的相同）\\n     */\\n    SPIN_FINISH: 'FG_ROULETTE_MANAGER_SPIN_FINISH',\\n\\n    /**@ch 轉盤開始旋轉時廣播*/\\n    SPIN_START: 'FG_ROULETTE_MANAGER_SPIN_START',\\n\\n    /**@ch 僅顯示指針（不旋轉）*/\\n    SHOW_POINTER: 'FG_ROULETTE_MANAGER_SHOW_POINTER',\\n\\n    /**@ch 顯示黑章遮罩（淡入）*/\\n    SHOW_BLACK_MASK: 'FG_ROULETTE_MANAGER_SHOW_BLACK_MASK',\\n\\n    /**@ch 隱藏黑章遮罩（淡出）*/\\n    HIDE_BLACK_MASK: 'FG_ROULETTE_MANAGER_HIDE_BLACK_MASK',\\n\\n    /**@ch 不旋轉直接走完 OnAllSpinsFinish 清理（三特色全拿用）*/\\n    FINISH_WITHOUT_SPIN: 'FG_ROULETTE_MANAGER_FINISH_WITHOUT_SPIN',\\n\\n    /**@ch 鎖住 Spin 按鈕（三特色全拿用，防止玩家手動觸發旋轉）*/\\n    LOCK_SPIN: 'FG_ROULETTE_MANAGER_LOCK_SPIN',\\n\\n    /**@ch 設定 RouletteSpine 的 Rudder event listener（進場結束後呼叫）*/\\n    SETUP_SPINE_LISTENER: 'FG_ROULETTE_MANAGER_SETUP_SPINE_LISTENER',\\n};\\n\\n// ─────────────────────────────────────────────\\n//  FG 轉盤強化選項\\n// ─────────────────────────────────────────────\\n/** FG 轉盤的 3 種強化選項 */\\nexport enum FGRouletteOption {\\n    /** 標靶符號強化：3X3 的範圍提升至 5X5 */\\n    TargetExpand = 0,\\n    /** 懸賞令強化：FG 中會出現兩張懸賞令，效果可疊加 */\\n    BountyDouble = 1,\\n    /** SCATTER 符號強化：FG 中轉出的 SCATTER 符號，加 1 局提升為加 2 局 */\\n    ScatterBoost = 2,\\n}\\n\\n// ─────────────────────────────────────────────\\n//  主元件\\n// ─────────────────────────────────────────────\\n/**\\n * FG 入場轉盤管理元件\\n * - 固定 3 個區塊：標靶符號強化 / 懸賞令強化 / SCATTER 符號強化\\n * - 繼承 RouletteRotate，直接沿用旋轉邏輯\\n * - 每次 OPEN 只旋轉一次；多個指針同時停下，由外部 UI 呈現各指針位置\\n * - 透過 eventManager 接收指令 / 廣播結果\\n * - 內建 Spin 按鈕管理，點擊後觸發旋轉，旋轉期間禁用按鈕\\n *\\n * 指針數量對照（SCATTER 數量由外部決定，隨 OPEN 事件傳入）：\\n *   SCATTER 3  → pointerCount = 1\\n *   SCATTER 4  → pointerCount = 2\\n *   SCATTER 5+ → pointerCount = 3\\n */\\n@ccclass('FGRouletteManager')\\nexport class FGRouletteManager extends RouletteRotate {\\n\\n    //#region Constants\\n    private static readonly SLOT_COUNT = 3;\\n    /** @ch 每次停輪後高亮展示時間（秒） */\\n    private static readonly DELAY_HIGHLIGHT = 1.5;\\n    /** @ch 多指針間的間隔時間（秒） */\\n    private static readonly DELAY_BETWEEN_SPINS = 1.0;\\n    /** @ch 自動開始旋轉的等待時間（秒） */\\n    private static readonly AUTO_START_DELAY = 5.0;\\n    /** @ch UPGRADES 面板展示時間（秒） */\\n    private static readonly UPGRADES_DISPLAY_DELAY = 3.0;\\n\\n    private static readonly EVENTS_TO_REGISTER = [\\n        FG_ROULETTE_MANAGER_EVENT.OPEN,\\n        FG_ROULETTE_MANAGER_EVENT.SHOW_UPGRADES,\\n        FG_ROULETTE_MANAGER_EVENT.SHOW_POINTER,\\n        FG_ROULETTE_MANAGER_EVENT.SHOW_BLACK_MASK,\\n        FG_ROULETTE_MANAGER_EVENT.HIDE_BLACK_MASK,\\n        FG_ROULETTE_MANAGER_EVENT.FINISH_WITHOUT_SPIN,\\n        FG_ROULETTE_MANAGER_EVENT.LOCK_SPIN,\\n        FG_ROULETTE_MANAGER_EVENT.SETUP_SPINE_LISTENER,\\n    ];\\n    //#endregion\\n\\n    //#region Properties\\n    @property({ type: Node, tooltip: '黑色遮罩節點（OPEN 後顯示，關閉時隱藏）' })\\n    private m_blackMaskNode: Node = null;\\n    public get BlackMaskNode(): Node { return this.m_blackMaskNode; }\\n\\n    @property({ type: Animation, tooltip: '黑章 Animation component' })\\n    private m_blackMaskAnim: Animation = null;\\n\\n    @property({ type: AnimationClip, tooltip: '黑章進場 clip' })\\n    private m_blackMaskInClip: AnimationClip = null;\\n\\n    @property({ type: AnimationClip, tooltip: '黑章退場 clip' })\\n    private m_blackMaskOutClip: AnimationClip = null;\\n\\n    @property({ type: Node, tooltip: '橫版砲台節點' })\\n    private m_cannonNode_H: Node = null;\\n\\n    @property({ type: Node, tooltip: '黑章下砲台父物件（橫版）' })\\n    private m_cannonParentUnderMask: Node = null;\\n\\n    @property({ type: Button, tooltip: 'Spin 按鈕元件' })\\n    private m_spinButton: Button = null;\\n\\n    //#endregion\\n\\n    //#region Variables\\n    /** @ch 是否已註冊事件 */\\n    private m_isEventRegistered: boolean = false;\\n\\n    /** @ch 轉盤旋轉音效 ID（-1 表示未播放） */\\n    private m_wheelSpinAudioId: number = -1;\\n\\n    /** @ch 砲台原始父節點 */\\n    private m_cannonOriginalParent: Node = null;\\n\\n    /** @ch 是否已完成資料初始化（OPEN 後設為 true） */\\n    private m_isDataInitialized: boolean = false;\\n\\n    /** @ch 本次開盤的指針數量 */\\n    private m_pointerCount: number = 0;\\n\\n    /** @ch 本次旋轉各指針的獲獎結果（OPEN 時由外部傳入） */\\n    private m_spinResults: FGRouletteOption[] = [];\\n\\n    /** @ch 旋轉停止後的 callback（OPEN 時由外部傳入，可選） */\\n    private m_onSpinFinishCallback: (() => void) | null = null;\\n    //#endregion\\n\\n    //#region LifeCycle\\n    protected onLoad(): void {\\n        this.m_iItemCount = FGRouletteManager.SLOT_COUNT;\\n        this.m_iCircleCount = 9;          // 增加圈數提高勻速段速度\\n        this.m_fRotateTime = 4.0;         // 總旋轉時間（秒）\\n        this.m_easing = 'quintOut';       // 一開始快速衝頂，後段非常緩慢地停下\\n        this.RegisterEvent();\\n        this.SetUIShow(false);\\n        this.SetPointerRootShow(false);\\n        this.CheckTestKeyCode();\\n    }\\n\\n    protected onDestroy(): void {\\n        this.UnregisterEvent();\\n        super.onDestroy();\\n    }\\n    //#endregion\\n\\n    //#region EventManager\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 事件處理（由 eventManager 呼叫）\\n     * @param event 事件名稱\\n     * @param args  事件參數\\n     */\\n    OnEvent(event: string, ...args: any[]): void {\\n        switch (event) {\\n            case FG_ROULETTE_MANAGER_EVENT.OPEN: {\\n                if (!this.ValidateOpenArgs(args)) {\\n                    error('[FGRouletteManager] OPEN event requires parameters: (pointerCount: number, spinResults: FGRouletteOption[], callback?: () => void)');\\n                    return;\\n                }\\n                const pointerCount = args[0] as number;\\n                const spinResults  = args[1] as FGRouletteOption[];\\n                const callback     = typeof args[2] === 'function' ? args[2] as () => void : null;\\n                this.Open(pointerCount, spinResults, callback);\\n                break;\\n            }\\n\\n            case FG_ROULETTE_MANAGER_EVENT.SHOW_UPGRADES: {\\n                const results = args[0] as FGRouletteOption[];\\n                const cb = typeof args[1] === 'function' ? args[1] as () => void : null;\\n                this.ShowUpgradesOnly(results, cb);\\n                break;\\n            }\\n\\n            case FG_ROULETTE_MANAGER_EVENT.SHOW_POINTER: {\\n                const count = args[0] as number;\\n                this.SetPointerByCount(count);\\n                break;\\n            }\\n\\n            case FG_ROULETTE_MANAGER_EVENT.SHOW_BLACK_MASK: {\\n                if (this.m_blackMaskNode) {\\n                    this.m_blackMaskNode.active = true;\\n                    if (this.m_blackMaskAnim && this.m_blackMaskInClip) this.m_blackMaskAnim.play(this.m_blackMaskInClip.name);\\n                }\\n                if (Common.GetGameView().IsLandscape && this.m_cannonNode_H && this.m_cannonParentUnderMask) {\\n                    this.m_cannonOriginalParent = this.m_cannonNode_H.parent;\\n                    this.m_cannonNode_H.setParent(this.m_cannonParentUnderMask, true);\\n                }\\n                eventManager.Dispatch(FREE_GAME_UI_MANAGER_EVENT.HIDE_ICONS_FOR_BLACK_MASK);\\n                break;\\n            }\\n\\n            case FG_ROULETTE_MANAGER_EVENT.HIDE_BLACK_MASK: {\\n                if (Common.GetGameView().IsLandscape && this.m_cannonNode_H && this.m_cannonOriginalParent) {\\n                    this.m_cannonNode_H.setParent(this.m_cannonOriginalParent, true);\\n                    this.m_cannonOriginalParent = null;\\n                }\\n                eventManager.Dispatch(FREE_GAME_UI_MANAGER_EVENT.SHOW_ICONS_FROM_BLACK_MASK);\\n                this.PlayFeatureIconOut();\\n                if (this.m_blackMaskNode) {\\n                    if (this.m_blackMaskAnim && this.m_blackMaskOutClip) {\\n                        this.m_blackMaskAnim.play(this.m_blackMaskOutClip.name);\\n                        this.m_blackMaskAnim.once(Animation.EventType.FINISHED, () => { this.m_blackMaskNode.active = false; });\\n                    } else {\\n                        this.m_blackMaskNode.active = false;\\n                    }\\n                }\\n                break;\\n            }\\n\\n            case FG_ROULETTE_MANAGER_EVENT.FINISH_WITHOUT_SPIN: {\\n                // 3 feature 全拿不走 OPEN，需在此設 spinResults\\n                if (args.length > 0 && Array.isArray(args[0])) {\\n                    this.m_spinResults = [...args[0]];\\n                }\\n                this.PlayFeatureIconBingo();\\n                this.OnAllSpinsFinish();\\n                break;\\n            }\\n\\n            case FG_ROULETTE_MANAGER_EVENT.LOCK_SPIN: {\\n                this.SetButtonInteractable(false);\\n                this.unscheduleAllCallbacks();\\n                break;\\n            }\\n\\n            case FG_ROULETTE_MANAGER_EVENT.SETUP_SPINE_LISTENER: {\\n                this.AttachRouletteSpineListener();\\n                break;\\n            }\\n\\n            default:\\n                warn(`[FGRouletteManager] OnEvent: 未知的事件 ${event}`);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 掛上轉盤 Spine 的持久 event listener（監聽 Rudder 事件）\\n     * SETUP_SPINE_LISTENER 事件與 OnClickSpinButton 共用，復用同一個 listener 實例\\n     */\\n    private m_rouletteSpineListener: (entry: sp.spine.TrackEntry, event: sp.spine.Event) => void = null;\\n\\n    private AttachRouletteSpineListener(): void {\\n        const rouletteSpine = Common.GetGameView().RouletteSpine;\\n        if (!rouletteSpine) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!this.m_rouletteSpineListener) {\\n            this.m_rouletteSpineListener = (entry: sp.spine.TrackEntry, event: sp.spine.Event) => {\\n                this.OnRouletteSpineEvent(event.data.name);\\n            };\\n        }\\n        rouletteSpine.setEventListener(this.m_rouletteSpineListener);\\n    }\\n\\n    private RegisterEvent(): void {\\n        if (this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        FGRouletteManager.EVENTS_TO_REGISTER.forEach(eventName => {\\n            eventManager.Register(eventName, this);\\n        });\\n\\n        if (this.m_spinButton?.node) {\\n             }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.PLAY_MARK:\\n                this.HandlePlayMark(args[0] as number, args[1] as () => void);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.PLAY_MARK_ACTIVE:\\n                this.HandlePlayMarkActive(args[0] as number, args[1] as () => void);\\n                break;\\n\\n    if (typeof resolve !== 'function') {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] PLAY_MARK_ACTIVE: resolve callback 缺失');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const items = this.GetItemsByBaseSymbol(baseSymbol);\\n        if (items.length === 0) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] PLAY_MARK_ACTIVE: 找不到對應 item, baseSymbol=', baseSymbol);\\n Promise.all(items.map(item =>\\n            item.PlayMarkActive().then(() => {\\n                if (this.m_currentBounty.some(b => b !== null)) item.SetContentVisible(false);\\n                else null)) this.NormalizeGhosts();\\n            resolve();\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 處理 GAME_INTRO_COMPLETE 事件\\n     * 遊戲介紹完成後顯示 1 個懸賞令（M1、倍率 9999）為「已定位」靜止畫面（不播 In 進場）。\\n     *   * Multiple=9999 ≥ Multiplier_Max → item 內部走 m_x9999Node 顯示分支。\\n     */\\n    private ShowGameIntroPoster() {\\n        this.EnsureCurrentBountySize();\\n        this.NormalizeGhosts();   // 防禦：0→1 return;\\n        }\\n        const data: IBountyData = { BaseSymbol: Symbol.M1, BountySymbol: 0, Multiple: 9999, MultipleIndex: 0 };\\n        // 先 active 再 setSkin：inactive 狀態下 setSkin 不會重建已渲染骨架的 this.m_currentBounty[0] = data;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 處理 PLAY_OUT_ALL 事件：全部懸賞令早退場（新一局舊盤掉出時觸發）\\n     * 同步清空綁定（清後 GetItemsByBaseSymbol 等立即視為空場），對每個 active item 播 Out，\\n     * this.NormalizeGhosts();   // 先釋放 ghost（active 但綁定 null）→ active=false，避免其被當成需退場的 real\\n        for (let i = 0; i < this.m_wantedPosterItems.length; i++) {\\n            const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[i];\\n            if (item && item.node.active) {\\n                this.m_currentBounty[i] = null;   // 同步清綁定（本波退場後場上視為空）\\n                item.PlayOut().then(() => {\\n                    item.node.active = false;\\n                    item.SetContentVisible(true);   // 還原 Content 預設態，供下次進場\\n                    item.ClearBaseSymbol();\\n                });\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n    //#endregion Event Management\\n\\n    //#region Methods\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設置懸賞令資料（以 BaseSymbol multiset 比對前後狀態 — 決定 進場 / 退場 / 退場再進場 / 持續）\\n     *\\n     * 比對規則（內容式，計數 multiset；每個 BaseSymbol 綁定一個 item，持續者保留原綁定）：\\n     * - BC-20 isNewRound=true（新一局）→ 現有全部退場、新清單全部進場（整批重建）\\n     * - BC-21 同局・新增 BaseSymbol（計數增加）→ 進場（SetData + active + PlayIn）\\n     * - 同・盤面(扣除被消除位置)已無此符號 → 原 item 退場再進場\\n     * - BC-25 同局・同 BaseSymbol・Multiple 同・盤面仍可見 → 持續，不播動畫\\n     * 位置重排一律交由 cc.Layout（本元件只處理 In/Out 動畫，不碰節點位置）。\\n     *\\n     * @param dataList 本輪懸賞令資料（Multiple>0 才顯示）\\n     * @param isNewRound 是否新一局（強制整批重建）；省略視為同局 cascade\\n     * @param visibleBaseSymbols 盤面(扣除被消除位置)目前可見的 BaseSymbol；僅 cascade 需傳，省略視為全可見\\n     */\\n    private SetWantedPosterData(dataList: IBountyData[], isNewRound: boolean = false, visibleBaseSymbols?: number[]) {\\n        if (!this.m_wantedPosterItems || this.m_wantedPosterItems.length === 0) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] SetWantedPosterData: 懸賞令物品未設置');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.EnsureCurrentBountySize();\\n\\n        const count = this.m_wantedPosterItems.length;\\n        // 本輪要顯示的 bounty（Multiple>0 且 BaseSymbol 非 Wanted_Empty 佔位），超量截斷至 item 數量上限\\n        // BaseSymbol === Wanted_Empty 視同空資料（懸賞海報空位），一併排除不顯示\\n        const newBounties = dataList.filter(d => d && d.Multiple > 0 && d.BaseSymbol !== Symbol.Wanted_Empty);\\n        if (newBounties.length > count) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] SetWantedPosterData: 資料數量超過物品數量',\\n                newBounties.length, '>', count);\\n            newBounties.length = count;\\n        }\\n\\n        if (isNewRound) {\\n            this.RebuildAll(newBounties);\\n        } else {\\n            this.ReconcileCascade(newBounties, visibleBaseSymbols);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch BC-20 整批重建（新一局）：現有全部 Out 並關閉，全部 Out 完成後新清單依序設資料、active、PlayIn。\\n     *     先 Out 再一起 In，避免新舊同時在場造成 Layout 重排跳動。\\n     *     綁定同步記錄為目標狀態（視覺在 Out 完成後才 In）。\\n     */\\n    private RebuildAll(newBounties: IBountyData[]) {\\n        // 整批重建前先釋放殘留 ghost：使下方以 node.active 判退場的迴圈不被 ghost（active 但隱形）干擾（BC-G4 · D5）\\n        this.NormalizeGhosts();\\n        const count = this.m_wantedPosterItems.length;\\n\\n        const outPromises: Promise<void>[] = [];\\n        for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {\\n            const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[i];\\n            if (item && item.node.active) {\\n                outPromises.push(item.PlayOut().then(() => { item.node.active = false; }));\\n            }\\n            // 同步記錄目標綁定（前 newBounties.length 個為新資料，其餘清空）\\n            this.m_currentBounty[i] = i < newBounties.length ? newBounties[i] : null;\\n        }\\n\\n        const enterAll = () => {\\n            for (let i = 0; i < newBounties.length; i++) {\\n                const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[i];\\n                if (!item) continue;\\n                // 先 active 再 ShowContent 再 setSkin：inactive/Content off 時 setSkin 不重建 render data（殘留舊 skin）\\n                item.node.active = true;\\n                item.SetContentVisible(true);\\n                item.SetWantedPosterData(newBounties[i]);\\n                item.PlayIn();\\n            }\\n        };\\n\\n        if (outPromises.length > 0) Promise.all(outPromises).then(enterAll);\\n        else enterAll();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 同局 cascade 對帳：以 BaseSymbol multiset 比對目前綁定 ↔ 新清單，保留持續者的 item 綁定。\\n     *     - 同 BaseSymbol・Multiple 同・盤面仍可見 → 持續（不動）         [BC-25]\\n     *     - 同 BaseSymbol・Multiple 變 或 盤面已無此符號 → 原 item 退場再進場 [BC-23/BC-24]\\n     *     - 多出的新 BaseSymbol → 進場（優先用原本就空的 item；不足才等退場者騰出版位）[BC-21]\\n     *     - 少掉的舊 BaseSymbol → 退場                                  [BC-22]\\n     * @param visibleBaseSymbols 盤面(扣除被消除位置)可見的 BaseSymbol；省略視為全可見\\n     */\\n    private ReconcileCascade(newBounties: IBountyData[], visibleBaseSymbols?: number[]) {\\n        const count = this.m_wantedPosterItems.length;\\n        const visible = visibleBaseSymbols ? new Set(visibleBaseSymbols) : null;\\n\\n        // 新清單依 BaseSymbol 分組成可消耗的 pool（multiset）\\n        const pool = new Map<number, IBountyData[]>();\\n        for (const b of newBounties) {\\n            const list = pool.get(b.BaseSymbol);\\n            if (list) list.push(b); else pool.set(b.BaseSymbol, [b]);\\n        }\\n\\n        const preFreeSlots: number[] = [];      // 更新前就空著的 item（含 pre-existing ghost），供進場立即 reuse\\n        const vacatingSlots: number[] = [];     // 本輪「真消失」騰出的 item，Out 完才可用\\n        const outPromises: Promise<void>[] = [];\\n        const deferredEnter: IBountyData[] = [];\\n        const leavingSlots: number[] = [];      // BC-22 離場者：ghost vs 真消失待 Pass A 後依 hasSurvivor 決定\\n        let hasSurvivor = false;                // 任一 BC-25 持續者（全程沒播 Out/In）→ 需 ghost 撐位防 snap\\n\\n        // Pass A：逐一決定目前已綁定 item 的命運（BC-22 離場決策延後到收尾）\\n        for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {\\n            const cur = this.m_currentBounty[i];\\n            const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[i];\\n            if (cur === null) {\\n                if (item) preFreeSlots.push(i);              // 空格或 pre-existing ghost（皆可被新進場 reuse）\\n                continue;\\n            }\\n            const bs = cur.BaseSymbol;\\n            const list = pool.get(bs);\\n            if (list && list.length > 0) {\\n                const onBoard = visible ? visible.has(bs) : true;\\n                // 優先配對「相同 Multiple」以持續（不播動畫）；盤面不可見則一律退場再進場\\n                const sameIdx = onBoard ? list.findIndex(b => b.Multiple === cur.Multiple) : -1;\\n                if (sameIdx >= 0) {\\n                    list.splice(sameIdx, 1);                 // BC-25 持續：消耗一筆，item 不動\\n                    hasSurvivor = true;                      // 連續顯示者，被搬動會被察覺 → 需 ghost 撐位\\n                } else {\\n                    const nb = list.shift()!;                // BC-23/BC-24 退場再進場（有 In 動畫遮蓋，不算 survivor）\\n                    if (item) item.PlayOut().then(() => { item.SetWantedPosterData(nb); item.PlayIn(); });\\n                    this.m_currentBounty[i] = nb;\\n                }\\n                if (list.length === 0) pool.delete(bs);\\n            } else {\\n                leavingSlots.push(i);                        // BC-22 離場：ghost/gone 待收尾決策\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        // Pass A 收尾：依 hasSurvivor 對離場者統一決策（ghost 撐位 vs 真消失）\\n        for (const i of leavingSlots) {\\n            const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[i];\\n            this.m_currentBounty[i] = null;\\n            if (hasSurvivor) {\\n                // BC-G1 轉 ghost：item root 維持 active 撐住 Layout 版位，讓 BC-25 持續者不 snap\\n                if (item) {\\n                    item.ClearBaseSymbol();\\n                    outPromises.push(item.PlayOut().then(() => { item.SetContentVisible(false); }));\\n                }\\n            } else {\\n                // 真消失：無連續 survivor 需保護\\n                if (item) outPromises.push(item.PlayOut().then(() => { item.node.active = false; }));\\n                vacatingSlots.push(i);\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        // Pass B：pool 剩餘 = 需進場的新 BaseSymbol [BC-21]\\n        const remaining: IBountyData[] = [];\\n        for (const list of pool.values()) remaining.push(...list);\\n        for (const nb of remaining) {\\n            if (preFreeSlots.length > 0) {\\n                this.EnterAt(preFreeSlots.shift()!, nb);     // 有現成空位/pre-existing ghost → 立即 reuse 進場\\n            } else {\\n                deferredEnter.push(nb);                      // 無現成空位 → 等退場者騰出\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        // 收尾：deferredEnter 等退場騰位 + postReal===0 釋放殘留 ghost（§5.3.1）\\n        // NormalizeGhosts 只釋放「active 且綁定 null」者；先 enter 後 normalize，EnterAt 已填綁定的格不受影響\\n        const needReleaseLingering = !this.m_currentBounty.some(b => b !== null);\\n        if (deferredEnter.length > 0 || needReleaseLingering) {\\n            Promise.all(outPromises).then(() => {\\n                for (const nb of deferredEnter) {\\n                    const idx = vacatingSlots.shift();\\n                    if (idx === undefined) break;            // 理論上不會（已截斷至 count）\\n                    this.EnterAt(idx, nb);\\n                }\\n                if (needReleaseLingering) this.NormalizeGhosts();\\n            });\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@ch 在指定 item 版位進場：設資料、active、PlayIn 並記錄綁定*/\\n    private EnterAt(index: number, data: IBountyData) {\\n        const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[index];\\n        if (!item) return;\\n        // 先 active 再 ShowContent 再 setSkin：reuse ghost 格時 Content 仍 off，須先開可見，\\n        // 否則 inactive 狀態下 setSkin 不會重建已渲染骨架的 render data（殘留舊 skin）\\n        item.node.active = true;\\n        item.SetContentVisible(true);\\n        item.SetWantedPosterData(data);\\n        item.PlayIn();\\n        this.m_currentBounty[index] = data;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 釋放所有 ghost（node.active 但綁定為 null）→ 還原為真消失 + Content 預設可見。\\n     * 用於：RebuildAll / HandleGameIntroComplete 起手（整批前清殘留，使 node.active 判定不被 ghost 干擾）、\\n     *       ReconcileCascade / HandlePlayMarkActive 退到全空時（避免上一輪保留的 ghost 隱形殘留 · BC-G4）。\\n     */\\n    private NormalizeGhosts() {\\n        for (let i = 0; i < this.m_wantedPosterItems.length; i++) {\\n            const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[i];\\n            if (item && item.node.active && this.m_currentBounty[i] === null) {\\n                item.node.active = false;\\n                item.SetContentVisible(true);   // 還原 Content 預設態，供下次進場\\n                item.ClearBaseSymbol();\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@ch 確保綁定追蹤陣列長度與 item 數一致（初次/變動時補 null、保留既有）*/\\n    private EnsureCurrentBountySize() {\\n        const count = this.m_wantedPosterItems.length;\\n        if (this.m_currentBounty.length === count) return;\\n        const next: (IBountyData | null)[] = new Array(count).fill(null);\\n        const keep = Math.min(this.m_currentBounty.length, count);\\n        for (let i = 0; i < keep; i++) next[i] = this.m_currentBounty[i];\\n        this.m_currentBounty = next;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依 BaseSymbol 取得**所有**相符的 active 常駐 item（內部用，PLAY_MARK / PLAY_MARK_ACTIVE 路徑）\\n     * 同一盤面允許多筆同 BaseSymbol bounty（各自設到不同 index 的 item），故回陣列而非單一\\n     */\\n    private GetItemsByBaseSymbol(baseSymbol: number): WantedPosterItem[] {\\n        if (baseSymbol === null || baseSymbol === undefined) return [];\\n        const result: WantedPosterItem[] = [];\\n        for (let i = 0; i < this.m_wantedPosterItems.length; i++) {\\n            const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[i];\\n            const cur = this.m_currentBounty[i];\\n            // 用 m_currentBounty 判斷「正在顯示真懸賞令」，排除 ghost（node.active 但綁定為 null）\\n            // — ghost 的 GetBaseSymbol() 已 ClearBaseSymbol 為 MAX，但以綁定為準更直接（BC-G5）\\n            if (item && item.node.active && cur !== null && cur.BaseSymbol === baseSymbol) {\\n                result.push(item);\\n            }\\n        }\\n        return result;\\n    }\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設置懸賞令 UI 顯示狀態\\n     * @param isShow 是否顯示\\n     */\\n    private SetWantedPosterUIShow(isShow: boolean) {\\n        if (!this.m_rootNode) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] SetWantedPosterUIShow: 根節點未設置');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.m_rootNode.active = isShow;\\n    }\\n    //#endregion Methods\\n\\n    //#region 測試功能\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 測試按鍵處理\\n     * - 數字鍵 1：顯示 1 個懸賞令\\n     * - 數字鍵 2：顯示 2 個懸賞令\\n     * - 數字鍵 3：顯示 UI\\n     * - 數字鍵 4：隱藏 UI\\n     */\\n    private CheckTestKeyCode(event: EventKeyboard): void {\\n        if (!DEBUG) return;\\n        switch (event.keyCode) {\\n            case KeyCode.DIGIT_1:\\n                // 測試：顯示 1 個懸賞令\\n                this.SetWantedPosterData([\\n                    { BaseSymbol: Symbol.M1, BountySymbol: 0, Multiple: 2, MultipleIndex: 0 },\\n                ], true);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case KeyCode.DIGIT_2:\\n                // 測試：顯示 2 個懸賞令\\n                this.SetWantedPosterData([\\n                    { BaseSymbol: Symbol.M4, BountySymbol: 0, Multiple: 256, MultipleIndex: 0 },\\n                    { BaseSymbol: Symbol.M8, BountySymbol: 0, Multiple: 9999, MultipleIndex: 1 },\\n                ], true);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case KeyCode.DIGIT_3:\\n                // 測試：顯示 UI\\n                this.SetWantedPosterUIShow(true);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case KeyCode.DIGIT_4:\\n                // 測試：隱藏 UI\\n                this.SetWantedPosterUIShow(false);\\n                break;\\n        }\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 測試功能\\n}\\n\\n\",\"numLines\":689,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":689}}"</outcome>

message.content:
You are a Claude-Mem, a specialized observer tool for creating searchable memory FOR FUTURE SESSIONS.

CRITICAL: Record what was LEARNED/BUILT/FIXED/DEPLOYED/CONFIGURED, not what you (the observer) are doing.

You do not have access to tools. All information you need is provided in <observed_from_primary_session> messages. Create observations from what you observe - no investigation needed.

<observed_from_primary_session>
  <user_request>幫我檢查一下有哪些還可以針對GC和效能優化，請勿直接修改</user_request>
  <requested_at>2026-07-07</requested_at>
</observed_from_primary_session>

Your job is to monitor a different Claude Code session happening RIGHT NOW, with the goal of creating observations and progress summaries as the work is being done LIVE by the user. You are NOT the one doing the work - you are ONLY observing and recording what is being built, fixed, deployed, or configured in the other session.

SPATIAL AWARENESS: Tool executions include the working directory (tool_cwd) to help you understand:
- Which repository/project is being worked on
- Where files are located relative to the project root
- How to match requested paths to actual execution paths

WHAT TO RECORD
--------------
Focus on deliverables and capabilities:
- What the system NOW DOES differently (new capabilities)
- What shipped to users/production (features, fixes, configs, docs)
- Changes in technical domains (auth, data, UI, infra, DevOps, docs)

Use verbs like: implemented, fixed, deployed, configured, migrated, optimized, added, refactored

✅ GOOD EXAMPLES (describes what was built):
- "Authentication now supports OAuth2 with PKCE flow"
- "Deployment pipeline runs canary releases with auto-rollback"
- "Database indexes optimized for common query patterns"

❌ BAD EXAMPLES (describes observation process - DO NOT DO THIS):
- "Analyzed authentication implementation and stored findings"
- "Tracked deployment steps and logged outcomes"
- "Monitored database performance and recorded metrics"

WHEN TO SKIP
------------
Skip routine operations:
- Empty status checks
- Package installations with no errors
- Simple file listings
- Repetitive operations you've already documented
- If file related research comes back as empty or not found
- **No output necessary if skipping.**

OUTPUT FORMAT
-------------
Output observations using this XML structure:

```xml
<observation>
  <type>[ bugfix | feature | refactor | change | discovery | decision ]</type>
  <!--
    **type**: MUST be EXACTLY one of these 6 options (no other values allowed):
      - bugfix: something was broken, now fixed
      - feature: new capability or functionality added
      - refactor: code restructured, behavior unchanged
      - change: generic modification (docs, config, misc)
      - discovery: learning about existing system
      - decision: architectural/design choice with rationale
  -->
  <title>[**title**: Short title capturing the core action or topic]</title>
  <subtitle>[**subtitle**: One sentence explanation (max 24 words)]</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
  </facts>
  <!--
    **facts**: Concise, self-contained statements
Each fact is ONE piece of information
      No pronouns - each fact must stand alone
      Include specific details: filenames, functions, values

**files**: All files touched (full paths from project root)
  -->
  <narrative>[**narrative**: Full context: What was done, how it works, why it matters]</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
  </concepts>
  <!--
    **concepts**: 2-5 knowledge-type categories. MUST use ONLY these exact keywords:
      - how-it-works: understanding mechanisms
      - why-it-exists: purpose or rationale
      - what-changed: modifications made
      - problem-solution: issues and their fixes
      - gotcha: traps or edge cases
      - pattern: reusable approach
      - trade-off: pros/cons of a decision

    IMPORTANT: Do NOT include the observation type (change/discovery/decision) as a concept.
    Types and concepts are separate dimensions.
  -->
  <files_read>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>
```


IMPORTANT! DO NOT do any work right now other than generating this OBSERVATIONS from tool use messages - and remember that you are a memory agent designed to summarize a DIFFERENT claude code session, not this one.

Never reference yourself or your own actions. Do not output anything other than the observation content formatted in the XML structure above. All other output is ignored by the system, and the system has been designed to be smart about token usage. Please spend your tokens wisely on useful observations.

Remember that we record these observations as a way of helping us stay on track with our progress, and to help us keep important decisions and changes at the forefront of our minds! :) Thank you so much for your help!

MEMORY PROCESSING START
=======================

attachment.content:
- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- dataviz: Use this skill whenever you are about to create ANY chart, graph, plot, dashboard, or data visualization, in ANY output medium — an HTML or React artifact, inline SVG, plotting code in any library (matplotlib, plotly, d3, Recharts, …), an image/PNG you will render and upload, or a chart shared into Slack. Read it BEFORE writing the first line of chart code, choosing chart colors, building a stat tile / meter / KPI row, or laying out a dashboard. Produces visualizations that read as one system — elegant, accessible, consistent in light and dark — using a brand-neutral placeholder palette you swap for your own. Teaches a design-system-agnostic method: a form heuristic, a color formula with a runnable validator, mark specs, and interaction rules. A validated default palette is documented in `references/palette.md` — swap that file's values for your brand's. Triggers on: "chart", "graph", "plot", "data viz", "visualization", "dashboard", "analytics", "visualize data", "categorical colors", "sequential / diverging palette", "stat tile", "sparkline", "heatmap", "legend", "axis", "tooltip", "chart colors", "color by series".
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by exercising it end-to-end and observing behavior — drive the affected flow, not just tests or typecheck. Run before committing nontrivial changes; bootstraps this repo's project verify skill if none exists yet. Don't invoke it on a diff that only touches tests, docs, or other code with no runtime surface to drive (a change to product source always has one) — there's nothing to observe.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled cloud agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring cloud agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Fable, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a GitHub pull request; for your working diff use /code-review
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

@ch 直接以目標角度啟動旋轉（三段式：加速→勻速→減速，速度連續）\\n     */\\n    private StartRotateByAngle(targetAngle: number, finishCallback?: () => void): void {\\n        if (!this.m_rotateRootNode || Rudder_On → show RotateRootNode children`);\\n            this.m_rotateRootNode.active = true;\\n            this.m_rotateRootNode.children.forEach(child => child.active = true);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 自訂速度曲線：加速→勻速→減速，保證速度連續\\n     * @param t 當前時間 [0,1]\\n     * @param t1 加速結束時間點\\n     * @param t2 勻速結束時間點\\n     * @returns progress [0,1]\\n     */\\n    private CalcSpeedCurve(t: number, t1: number, t2: number): number {\\n        // 勻速段的歸一化速度 v（讓總距離 = 1）\\n        // 加速段面積 = 0.5*v*t1, 勻速段面積 = v*(t2-t1), 減速段面積 = 0.5*v*(1-t2)\\n        // 總面積 = v * (0.5*t1 + (t2-t1) + 0.5*(1-t2)) = v * (0.5 + 0.5*t2 - 0.5*t1) 不對\\n        // 正確：總面積 = 0.5*v*t1 + v*(t2-t1) + 0.5*v*(1-t2) = v*(0.5*t1 + t2-t1 + 0.5-0.5*t2)\\n        //            = v * (0.5 - 0.5*t1 +       // 本輪要顯示的 bounty（Multiple>0 且 BaseSymbol 非 Wanted_Empty 佔位），超量截斷至 item 數量上限\\n        // BaseSymbol === Wanted_Empty 視同空資料（懸賞海報空位），一併排除不顯示\\n        const newBounties = dataList.filter(d => d && d.Multiple > 0 && d.BaseSymbol !== Symbol.Wanted_Empty);\\n        if (newBounties.length > count) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] SetWantedPosterData: 資料數量超過物品數量',\\n                newBounties.length, '>', count);\\n            newBounties.length = count;\\n        }\\n\\n        if (isNewRound) {\\n            this.RebuildAll(newBounties);\\n        } else {\\n            this.ReconcileCascade(newBounties, visibleBaseSymbols);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch BC-20 整批重建（新一局）：現有全部 Out 並關閉，全部 Out 完成後新清單依序設資料、active、PlayIn。\\n     *     先 Out 再一起 In，避免新舊同時在場造成 Layout 重排跳動。\\n     *     綁定同步記錄為目標狀態（視覺在 Out 完成後才 In）。\\n     */\\n    private RebuildAll(newBounties: IBountyData[]) {\\n        // 整批重建前先釋放殘留 ghost：使下方以 node.active 判退場的迴圈不被 ghost（active 但隱形）干擾（BC-G4 · D5）\\n        this.NormalizeGhosts();\\n        const count = this.m_wantedPosterItems.length;\\n\\n        const outPromises: Promise<void>[] = [];\\n        for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {\\n            const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[i];\\n            if (item && item.node.active) {\\n                outPromises.push(item.PlayOut().then(() => { item.node.active = false; }));\\n            }\\n            // 同步記錄目標綁定（前 newBounties.length 個為新資料，其餘清空）\\n            this.m_currentBounty[i] = i < newBounties.length ? newBounties[i] : null;\\n        }\\n\\n        const enterAll = () => {\\n            for (let i = 0; i < newBounties.length; i++) {\\n                const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[i];\\n                if (!item) continue;\\n                // 先 active 再 ShowContent 再 setSkin：inactive/Content off 時 setSkin 不重建 render data（殘留舊 skin）\\n                item.node.active = true;\\n                item.SetContentVisible(true);\\n                item.SetWantedPosterData(newBounties[i]);\\n                item.PlayIn();\\n            }\\n        };\\n\\n        if (outPromises.length > 0) Promise.all(outPromises).then(enterAll);\\n        else enterAll();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 同局 cascade 對帳：以 BaseSymbol multiset 比對目前綁定 ↔ 新清單，保留持續者的 item 綁定。\\n     *     - 同 BaseSymbol・Multiple 同・盤面仍可見 → 持續（不動）         [BC-25]\\n     *     - 同 BaseSymbol・Multiple 變 或 盤面已無此符號 → 原 item 退場再進場 [BC-23/BC-24]\\n     *     - 多出的新 BaseSymbol → 進場（優先用原本就空的 item；不足才等退場者騰出版位）[BC-21]\\n     *     - 少掉的舊 BaseSymbol → 退場                                  [BC-22]\\n     * @param visibleBaseSymbols 盤面(扣除被消除位置)可見的 BaseSymbol；省略視為全可見\\n     */\\n    private ReconcileCascade(newBounties: IBountyData[], visibleBaseSymbols?: number[]) {\\n        const count = this.m_wantedPosterItems.length;\\n        const visible = visibleBaseSymbols ? new Set(visibleBaseSymbols) : null;\\n\\n        // 新清單依 BaseSymbol 分組成可消耗的 pool（multiset）\\n        const pool = new Map<number, IBountyData[]>();\\n        for (const b of newBounties) {\\n            const list = pool.get(b.BaseSymbol);\\n            if (list) list.push(b); else pool.set(b.BaseSymbol, [b]);\\n        }\\n\\n        const preFreeSlots: number[] = [];      // 更新前就空著的 item（含 pre-existing ghost），供進場立即 reuse\\n        const vacatingSlots: number[] = [];     // 本輪「真消失」騰出的 item，Out 完才可用\\n        const outPromises: Promise<void>[] = [];\\n        const deferredEnter: IBountyData[] = [];\\n        const leavingSlots: number[] = [];      // BC-22 離場者：ghost vs 真消失待 Pass A 後依 hasSurvivor 決定\\n        let hasSurvivor = false;                // 任一 BC-25 持續者（全程沒播 Out/In）→ 需 ghost 撐位防 snap\\n\\n        // Pass A：逐一決定目前已綁定 item 的命運（BC-22 離場決策延後到收尾）\\n        for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {\\n            const cur = this.m_currentBounty[i];\\n            const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[i];\\n            if (cur === null) {\\n                if (item) preFreeSlots.push(i);              // 空格或 pre-existing ghost（皆可被新進場 reuse）\\n                continue;\\n            }\\n            const bs = cur.BaseSymbol;\\n            const list = pool.get(bs);\\n            if (list && list.length > 0) {\\n                const onBoard = visible ? visible.has(bs) : true;\\n                // 優先配對「相同 Multiple」以持續（不播動畫）；盤面不可見則一律退場再進場\\n                const sameIdx = onBoard ? list.findIndex(b => b.Multiple === cur.Multiple) : -1;\\n                if (sameIdx >= 0) {\\n                    list.splice(sameIdx, 1);                 // BC-25 持續：消耗一筆，item 不動\\n                    hasSurvivor = true;                      // 連續顯示者，被搬動會被察覺 → 需 ghost 撐位\\n                } else {\\n                    const nb = list.shift()!;                // BC-23/BC-24 退場再進場（有 In 動畫遮蓋，不算 survivor）\\n                    if (item) item.PlayOut().then(() => { item.SetWantedPosterData(nb); item.PlayIn(); });\\n                    this.m_currentBounty[i] = nb;\\n                }\\n                if (list.length === 0) pool.delete(bs);\\n            } else {\\n                leavingSlots.push(i);                        // BC-22 離場：ghost/gone 待收尾決策\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        // Pass A 收尾：依 hasSurvivor 對離場者統一決策（ghost 撐位 vs 真消失）\\n        for (const i of leavingSlots) {\\n            const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[i];\\n            this.m_currentBounty[i] = null;\\n            if (hasSurvivor) {\\n                // BC-G1 轉 ghost：item root 維持 active 撐住 Layout 版位，讓 BC-25 持續者不 snap\\n                if (item) {\\n                    item.ClearBaseSymbol();\\n                    outPromises.push(item.PlayOut().then(() => { item.SetContentVisible(false); }));\\n                }\\n            } else {\\n                // 真消失：無連續 survivor 需保護\\n                if (item) outPromises.push(item.PlayOut().then(() => { item.node.active = false; }));\\n                vacatingSlots.push(i);\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        // Pass B：pool 剩餘 = 需進場的新 BaseSymbol [BC-21]\\n        const remaining: IBountyData[] = [];\\n        for (const list of pool.values()) remaining.push(...list);\\n        for (const nb of remaining) {\\n            if (preFreeSlots.length > 0) {\\n                this.EnterAt(preFreeSlots.shift()!, nb);     // 有現成空位/pre-existing ghost → 立即 reuse 進場\\n            } else {\\n                deferredEnter.push(nb);                      // 無現成空位 → 等退場者騰出\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        // 收尾：deferredEnter 等退場騰位 + postReal===0 釋放殘留 ghost（§5.3.1）\\n        // NormalizeGhosts 只釋放「active 且綁定 null」者；先 enter 後 normalize，EnterAt 已填綁定的格不受影響\\n        const needReleaseLingering = !this.m_currentBounty.some(b => b !== null);\\n        if (deferredEnter.length > 0 || needReleaseLingering) {\\n            Promise.all(outPromises).then(() => {\\n                for (const nb of deferredEnter) {\\n                    const idx = vacatingSlots.shift();\\n                    if (idx === undefined) break;            // 理論上不會（已截斷至 count）\\n                    this.EnterAt(idx, nb);\\n                }\\n                if (needReleaseLingering) this.NormalizeGhosts();\\n            });\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@ch 在指定 item 版位進場：設資料、active、PlayIn 並記錄綁定*/\\n    private EnterAt(index: number, data: IBountyData) {\\n        const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[index];\\n        if (!item) return;\\n        // 先 active 再 ShowContent 再 setSkin：reuse ghost 格時 Content 仍 off，須先開可見，\\n        // 否則 inactive 狀態下 setSkin 不會重建已渲染骨架的 render data（殘留舊 skin）\\n        item.node.active = true;\\n        item.SetContentVisible(true);\\n        item.SetWantedPosterData(data);\\n        item.PlayIn();\\n        this.m_currentBounty[index] = data;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 釋放所有 ghost（node.active 但綁定為 null）→ 還原為真消失 + Content 預設可見。\\n     * 用於：RebuildAll / HandleGameIntroComplete 起手（整批前清殘留，使 node.active 判定不被 ghost 干擾）、\\n     *       ReconcileCascade / HandlePlayMarkActive 退到全空時（避免上一輪保留的 ghost 隱形殘留 · BC-G4）。\\n     */\\n    private NormalizeGhosts() {\\n        for (let i = 0; i < this.m_wantedPosterItems.length; i++) {\\n            const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[i];\\n            if (item && item.node.active && this.m_currentBounty[i] === null) {\\n                item.node.active = false;\\n                item.SetContentVisible(true);   // 還原 Content 預設態，供下次進場\\n                item.ClearBaseSymbol();\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@ch 確保綁定追蹤陣列長度與 item 數一致（初次/變動時補 null、保留既有）*/\\n    private EnsureCurrentBountySize() {\\n        const count = this.m_wantedPosterItems.length;\\n        if (this.m_currentBounty.length === count) return;\\n        const next: (IBountyData | null)[] = new Array(count).fill(null);\\n        const keep = Math.min(this.m_currentBounty.length, count);\\n        for (let i = 0; i < keep; i++) next[i] = this.m_currentBounty[i];\\n        this.m_currentBounty = next;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依 BaseSymbol 取得**所有**相符的 active 常駐 item（內部用，PLAY_MARK / PLAY_MARK_ACTIVE 路徑）\\n     * 同一盤面允許多筆同 BaseSymbol bounty（各自設到不同 index 的 item），故回陣列而非單一\\n     */\\n    private GetItemsByBaseSymbol(baseSymbol: number): WantedPosterItem[] {\\n        if (baseSymbol === null || baseSymbol === undefined) return [];\\n        const result: WantedPosterItem[] = [];\\n        for (let i = 0; i < this.m_wantedPosterItems.length; i++) {\\n            const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[i];\\n            const cur = this.m_currentBounty[i];\\n            // 用 m_currentBounty 判斷「正在顯示真懸賞令」，排除 ghost（node.active 但綁定為 null）\\n            // — ghost 的   }\\n        }\\n        return result;\\n    }\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設置懸賞令 UI 顯示狀態\\n     * @param isShow 是否顯示\\n     */\\n    private SetWantedPosterUIShow(isShow: boolean) {\\n        if Methods\\n\\n    //#region 測試功能\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 測試按鍵處理\\n     * - 數字鍵 1：顯示 1 個懸賞令\\n     * - 數字鍵 2：顯示 2 個懸賞令\\n     * - 數字鍵 3：顯示 UI\\n     * - 數字鍵 4：隱藏 UI\\n     */\\n    private col < Game_Define.COL; col++) {\\n            const visibleSymbolCount = this.GetVisibleSymbolCount(col);\\n            if (position < currentIndex + visibleSymbolCount) {\\n                const row = position - currentIndex;\\n                return { col, row };\\n            }\\n            currentIndex += visibleSymbolCount;\\n        }\\n        \\n        // 如果到這裡，說明計算有誤\\n        error(`GetColRowFromPosition: Unable to calculate position ${position}`);\\n        return { col: 0, row: 0 };\\n    }\\n    \\n    /**\\n     * 根據行列座標取得一維位置索引\\n     * @param col 列索引 (0 ~ Game_Define.COL-1)\\n     * @param row 行索引 (0 ~ visibleSymbolCount-1)\\n     * @returns 一維位置索引 (0 ~ N-1)，無效時回傳 -1\\n     */\\n    GetPositionFromColRow(col: number, row: number): number {\\n        // 檢查輸入有效性\\n        if (col < 0 || col >= Game_Define.COL) {\\n            error(`GetPositionFromColRow: Invalid col ${col}`);\\n            return -1;\\n        }\\n        \\n        const visibleSymbolCount = this.GetVisibleSymbolCount(col);\\n        if (row < 0 || row >= visibleSymbolCount) {\\n            error(`GetPositionFromColRow: Invalid row ${row} for col ${col} (max: ${visibleSymbolCount - 1})`);\\n            return -1;\\n        }\\n        \\n        // 計算該行列座標對應的一維位置索引\\n        let position = 0;\\n        for (let c = 0; protocol.ar2pq9Proto.IIntAry[]\\n    ): Promise<void>\\n    {\\n        if ( group.length === 0 ) return;\\n\\n        // 組內共同 BaseSymbol（前提②：同 BaseSymbol 的 BountySymbol 一定相同）\\n        const );\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // 位置由組內共同 BaseSymbol 單次取得（與組內筆數無關）\\n        const matchedAward = awardDataVec.find(\\n            award => award.Symbol === baseSymbol\\n                && award.EliminatePos\\n                && award.EliminatePos.length > 0\\n        );\\n        if ( !matchedAward ) return;\\n\\n        // 過濾掉 Wild 位置（spine 與 ④底板只跑非 wild；wild 的消除/底板已在     // 把 positions(一維索引) 轉為世界座標（事件 payload 用世界座標，避免在 manager 跨越 SlotReels 依賴）\\n        const worldPositions = filteredPositions.map( pos => {\\n            const col = Math.floor( pos / Mark — 事件 + Promise wrapper（同 EffectPlate 對 MULTIPLIER_BASE_MANAGER 的風格）\\n        await new Promise<void>( resolve => {\\n            eventManager.Dispatch(\\n                WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.PLAY_MARK,\\n                baseSymbol,\\n                resolve\\n            );\\n        } );\\n\\n        // ② 懸賞令 spine 進場（Symbol_In）。symbol/wild 消除已在 ExplodeState 步驟①完成，此處不再消除\\n        const spawnedNodes: Node[] = await this.m_gameView.EffectPlate.SpawnAndPlayWantedSymbolIn(\\n            worldPositions, baseSymbol, multiplier\\n        );\\n\\n        // ③ WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.PLAY_MARK_ACTIVE,\\n                    baseSymbol,\\n                    resolve\\n                );\\n            } ),\\n            this.m_gameView.EffectPlate.PlayWantedSymbolActiveAndRecycle( spawnedNodes ),\\n        ] );\\n\\n        // ④ 場上 Wanted 表演完成後，更新懸賞令位置的乘倍底板（帶 Spine 動畫）\\n        // 移到組末才升底板，避免被階段②/③的 Spine filteredPositions )\\n        {\\n            const col = Math.floor( pos / Game_Define.ROW );\\n            const row = pos % Game_Define.ROW;\\n            upgradePromises.push( new Promise<void>( resolve =>\\n            {\\n                eventManager.Dispatch(\\n                    MULTIPLIER_BASE_MANAGER_EVENT.SET_MULTIPLIER_WITH_ANIM,\\n                    pos,\\n                    basePlateIndexes[ col ].Data[ row ],\\n                    resolve\\n                );\\n            } ) );\\n        }\\n        await Promise.all( upgradePromises );\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch BC-1：將已觸發的 bounty 以 BaseSymbol 分組\\n     * 同 BaseSymbol 歸同組；組順序依各 BaseSymbol 首次出現順序，組內保留原順序。\\n     * 輸入契約：吃 FindTriggeredBounties 的輸出（已觸發子集），非原始 bountyDataVec。\\n     */\\n    private GroupBountiesByBaseSymbol(\\n        bounties: protocol.ar2pq9Proto.IBountyData[]\\n    ): protocol.ar2pq9Proto.IBountyData[][]\\n    {\\n        const groups: protocol.ar2pq9Proto.IBountyData[][] = [];\\n        const groupIndexByBaseSymbol = new Map<number, number>();\\n        for ( const bounty of bounties )\\n        {\\n            const key = bounty.BaseSymbol;\\n            if ( key === null || key === undefined ) continue;\\n            const existing = groupIndexByBaseSymbol.get( key );\\n            if ( existing !== undefined )\\n            {\\n                groups[ existing ].push( bounty );\\n            }\\n            else\\n            {\\n                groupIndexByBaseSymbol.set( key, groups.length );\\n                groups.push( [ bounty ] );\\n            }\\n        }\\n        return groups;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch BC-2：組內 Multiple 連乘（純函式）\\n     * DR-9：Multiple 為 null/undefined/非有限數 → 視為中性值 1（跳過不計），避免連乘塌成 0。\\n     * 空組回 1。\\n     */\\n    private ComputeGroupMultiplier(\\n        group: protocol.ar2pq9Proto.IBountyData[]\\n    ): number\\n    {\\n        let product = 1;\\n        for ( const bounty of group )\\n        {\\n            const m = bounty.Multiple;\\n            if ( m !== null && m !== undefined && Number.isFinite( m ) )\\n            {\\n                product *= m;\\n            }\\n        }\\n        return product;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 找出被消除的符號中命中懸賞令的資料\\n     * BC-3：EliminatePos.length > 0 代表該符號有被消除；\\n     *       若其 Symbol 值等於某懸賞令的 BaseSymbol，則該懸賞令被觸發。\\n     * R-4：award.Symbol /       }\\n\\n        // 收集本次被消除的符號 ID\\n        const eliminatedSymbols = new Set<number>();\\n        for ( const award of awardDataVec )\\n        {\\n            if ( award.EliminatePos &&    }\\n\\n        // 比對懸賞令的 BaseSymbol\\n        return bountyDataVec.filter( bounty =>\\n            bounty.BaseSymbol !== null && bounty.BaseSymbol !== undefined\\n            &&   } );\\n    }\\n\\n}\\n\",\"numLines\":267,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":267}}"</outcome>

 if ( symbolId < Symbol.M1 || symbolId > Symbol.M9 ) return null;\\n    return Symbol[ symbolId ] ?? null;\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch 常駐懸賞單元件 — 播放 In / Out / Mark / Mark_Active 動畫\\n * 倍率數字節點掛在 prefab content.thinking:
The user's primary session is conducting a performance and GC optimization analysis of a Cocos Creator game. New files have been read:

1. **BackgroundManager.ts** - Manages background animations and sprites, switches between main game and free game backgrounds
2. **BSSpineCtrl.ts** - Controls character and cannon spine animations, handles landscape/portrait orientation
3. **SymbolChange.ts** - Handles symbol change animations with Wild spine effects
4. **GameIntroManager.ts** - Manages game intro animations with promise-based orchestration
5. **FreeGameUIManager.ts** - Free game UI with round counters, feature icons, tween animations
6. **AddSpinFlyEffect.ts** - Tween-based fly effect for free game add spins

The grep search looked for spin-related methods and update loops, finding:
- BigWinControll.ts has update(dt)
- GameView.ts has update(deltaTime)
- FrameAnimation.ts has update(dt)
- TimelineExecutor.ts has update(dt)
- SpinState.ts calls SlotReels.Spin(dt) in its OnProcess method

Key performance patterns observed:
1. Event system with eventManager.Register/Dispatch pattern
2. Tween animations with onUpdate callbacks
3. Promise.all orchestration for animations
4. Spine animation control
5. String concatenation in update loops
6. Array iterations in event handlers
7. Object pooling (PrefabPoolManager in AddSpinFlyEffect)
8. Vec3 constants for GC optimization (SCALE_BOUNCE, SCALE_NORMAL in FreeGameUIManager)

This is a discovery-type observation about performance analysis patterns found in the codebase.

<observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>Performance Patterns and Potential GC Pressure Points Identified</title>
  <subtitle>Discovered object pooling, tween callbacks, string operations, and event system patterns across UI and animation managers</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>FreeGameUIManager implements Vec3 constant reuse (SCALE_BOUNCE, SCALE_NORMAL) to avoid GC pressure in tween animations</fact>
    <fact>AddSpinFlyEffect uses PrefabPoolManager with object pooling and explicit particle system cleanup (stop, clear, resetSystem) before node reuse</fact>
    <fact>GameIntroManager uses Promise.all for parallel spine animation orchestration with scheduleOnce callbacks</fact>
    <fact>FreeGameUIManager performs string concatenation in CountUpTotalRound onUpdate callback during tween animation</fact>
    <fact>BSSpineCtrl conditionally constructs animation name strings with prefix concatenation in Play method based on orientation</fact>
    <fact>SpinState.OnProcess calls SlotReels.Spin(dt) every frame during spin state</fact>
    <fact>BackgroundManager iterates m_bgSpriteChanges array with forEach in ChangeBackgroundSprite method</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>
Analysis identified several performance patterns and potential GC optimization opportunities across game UI and animation systems. Strong patterns found: (1) Object pooling with proper cleanup in AddSpinFlyEffect demonstrates best practice for particle-based effects, (2) FreeGameUIManager already implements Vec3 constant reuse to reduce allocations in tween scale animations, (3) String concatenation in tween onUpdate callbacks (round counter display) creates allocations every frame during count-up animations, (4) BSSpineCtrl constructs animation name strings dynamically with prefix concatenation in hot paths, (5) GameIntroManager uses Promise.all orchestration which is appropriate for one-time intro but creates promise overhead, (6) Event system with eventManager Register/Dispatch pattern used pervasively for loose coupling but involves string comparisons and argument spreading, (7) SpinState calls SlotReels.Spin(dt) every frame during active spinning. Key optimization candidates: string operations in animation callbacks, dynamic string construction in spine animation paths, and potential caching opportunities for frequently accessed animation names.
  </narrative>

(this.m_gameView.PendingAwardResults.length > 0) {\\n            for (const pending of this.m_gameView.PendingAwardResults) {\\n                this.m_gameView.RoundWin =     // 把 positions(一維索引) 轉為世界座標（事件 payload 用世界座標，避免在 manager 跨越 SlotReels 依賴）\\n        const worldPositions = filteredPositions.map( pos => {\\n            const col = Math.floor( pos / WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.PLAY_MARK,\\n                baseSymbol,\\n                resolve\\n            );\\n        } );\\n\\n        // ② 懸賞令 spine 進場（Symbol_In）。symbol/wild 消除已在 ExplodeState filteredPositions )\\n        {\\n            const col = Math.floor( pos / Game_Define.ROW );\\n            const row = pos % Game_Define.ROW;\\n            upgradePromises.push( new Promise<void>( resolve =>\\n            {\\n                eventManager.Dispatch(\\n                    MULTIPLIER_BASE_MANAGER_EVENT.SET_MULTIPLIER_WITH_ANIM,\\n                    pos,\\n                    basePlateIndexes[ col ].Data[ row ],\\n                    resolve\\n                );\\n            } ) );\\n        }\\n        await Promise.all( upgradePromises );\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch BC-1：將已觸發的 bounty 以 BaseSymbol 分組\\n     * 同 BaseSymbol 歸同組；組順序依各 BaseSymbol 首次出現順序，組內保留原順序。\\n     * 輸入契約：吃 FindTriggeredBounties 的輸出（已觸發子集），非原始 bountyDataVec。\\n     */\\n    private GroupBountiesByBaseSymbol(\\n        bounties: protocol.ar2pq9Proto.IBountyData[]\\n    ): protocol.ar2pq9Proto.IBountyData[][]\\n    {\\n        const groups: protocol.ar2pq9Proto.IBountyData[][] = [];\\n        const groupIndexByBaseSymbol = new Map<number, number>();\\n        for ( const bounty of bounties )\\n        {\\n            const key = bounty.BaseSymbol;\\n            if ( key === null || key === undefined ) continue;\\n            const existing = groupIndexByBaseSymbol.get( key );\\n            if ( existing !== undefined )\\n            {\\n                groups[ existing ].push( bounty );\\n            }\\n            else\\n            {\\n                groupIndexByBaseSymbol.set( key, groups.length );\\n                groups.push( [ bounty ] );\\n            }\\n        }\\n        return groups;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch BC-2：組內 Multiple 連乘（純函式）\\n     * DR-9：Multiple 為 null/undefined/非有限數 → 視為中性值 1（跳過不計），避免連乘塌成 0。\\n     * 空組回 1。\\n     */\\n    private ComputeGroupMultiplier(\\n        group: protocol.ar2pq9Proto.IBountyData[]\\n    ): number\\n    {\\n        let product = 1;\\n        for ( const bounty of group )\\n        {\\n            const m = bounty.Multiple;\\n            if ( m !== null && m !== undefined && Number.isFinite( m ) )\\n            {\\n                product *= m;\\n            }\\n        }\\n        return product;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 找出被消除的符號中命中懸賞令的資料\\n     * BC-3：EliminatePos.length > 0 代表該符號有被消除；\\n     *       若其 Symbol 值等於某懸賞令的 BaseSymbol，則該懸賞令被觸發。\\n     * R-4：award.Symbol /       }\\n\\n        // 收集本次被消除的符號 ID\\n        const eliminatedSymbols = new Set<number>();\\n        for ( const award of awardDataVec )\\n        {\\n            if ( award.EliminatePos &&   } );\\n    }\\n\\n}\\n\",\"numLines\":267,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":267}}"</outcome>

'懸賞倍率透明度'\\n    })\\n    private m_multiplierLabelUIOpacity: UIOpacity = null;\\n\\n    @property({\\n        type: Node,\\n        tooltip: '懸賞倍率X9999 節點'\\n    })\\n    private m_x9999Node: Node = null;\\n\\n    @property({\\n        type: UIOpacity,\\n        tooltip: '懸賞倍率X9999透明度'\\n    })\\n    private m_x9999UIOpacity: UIOpacity = null;\\n\\n    @property({\\n        type: Node,\\n        tooltip: '內容容器（Spine + 倍率）。ghost 佔位時關閉此節點：內容隱形但 item root 仍被 cc.Layout 計入版位'\\n    })\\n    private m_contentNode: Node = null;\\n    //#endregion Properties\\n\\n    //#region Variables\\n    /**@ch 當前綁定的 BaseSymbol*/\\n    private m_baseSymbol: Symbol = Symbol.MAX;\\n\\n    /**@ch 倍率 label 淡出時長（秒）*/\\n    private static readonly MULTIPLIER_FADE_OUT_DURATION: number = 0.1;\\n    //#endregion Variables\\n\\n    //#region Public API\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設置懸賞單資料：切 skin、設數字、紀錄 BaseSymbol（不負責動畫觸發，由 Manager 決定）\\n     * @param data 懸賞單資料\\n     */\\n    public SetWantedPosterData( data: IBountyData ): void {\\n        this.m_baseSymbol = data.BaseSymbol as Symbol;\\n        this.SetSkinBySymbol( this.m_baseSymbol );\\n        this.SetMultiplierLabel( data.Multiple );\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@ch 取得當前綁定的 BaseSymbol（State 比對用）*/\\n    public GetBaseSymbol(): Symbol {\\n        return this.m_baseSymbol;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設定內容可見性（ghost slot 機制）：關閉時 Spine/倍率隱形，但 item root 仍被 skin 切換 API（場上實例用，不走 SetWantedPosterData 因為不需要設 multiplier label）\\n     * EH-2：Symbol 不在 M1~M9 範圍 → warn + 不切\\n     */\\n    public SetSkin( symbolId: Symbol ): void {\\n        this.m_baseSymbol = symbolId;\\n        this.SetSkinBySymbol( symbolId );\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 場上實例設定倍率顯示（合併組連乘值，純表演）；須在 SetSkin 之後呼叫\\n     * IF-2：委派既有 private SetMultiplierLabel，避免格式字串重複；label 為 null 時靜默（EH-3）\\n     */\\n    public SetFieldMultiplier( multiplier: number ): void {\\n        this.SetMultiplierLabel( multiplier );\\n    }\\n    //#endregion Public API\\n\\n    //#region Private\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依 Symbol 切 skin（M1~M9）\\n     * EH-2：Symbol 不在範圍 → warn + 不切\\n     */\\n    private SetSkinBySymbol( symbolId: Symbol ): void {\\n        if ( !this.m_spine ) {\\n            warn( '[WantedPosterItem] SetSkinBySymbol: m_spine 未設置' );\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const skinName = GetSkinNameBySymbol( symbolId );\\n        if ( !skinName ) {\\n            warn( '[WantedPosterItem] SetSkinBySymbol: Symbol 不在 M1~M9 範圍', symbolId );\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.m_spine.setSkin( skinName );\\n        this.m_spine.setSlotsToSetupPose();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設置倍率顯示（涵蓋常駐 item 與場上 spine 兩條顯示路徑）\\n     * 倍率 >= Game_Define.Multiplier_Max → 只顯示 m_x9999Node、隱藏倍率 Label\\n     * 反之 → 只顯示倍率 Label（*N）、隱藏 m_x9999Node\\n     */\\n content.thinking:
The user is observing a Cocos Creator game project being analyzed for GC and performance optimization opportunities. I've now seen extensive reads across many game state files, manager files, and the core SlotReels.ts file.

Let me identify the key findings from what I've observed:

1. **SlotReels.ts** - Massive file (4032 lines) with:
   - Frequent calls to `GetColRowFromPosition`, `GetPositionFromColRow`, `GetTargetSymbolCount`, `GetVisibleSymbolCount` - these involve loops and calculations
   - Heavy use of `ConvertSymbolsToSymbolInfos` which creates new SymbolInfo objects with `.map()`
   - `ToolsStrip` called frequently for floating point precision fixes
   - `CalSpinTime` called per column during spin calculations
   - Tween callbacks in `TileMatchingAndPatchUp` with closures capturing state
   - Promise.all patterns with array operations

2. **State Management** - Multiple state classes (SpinState, ExplodeState, CountMultState, etc.):
   - Each state calls into SlotReels with frame-by-frame updates
   - Heavy use of `Promise.all` for parallel animations
   - Array operations in hot paths (filter, map, forEach)
   - String template literals and concatenation in loops

3. **CountMultState** - Good optimization already:
   - Uses class-level `_posOwnerMap: Map<number, number>` that's cleared and reused instead of `new Map()` each turn - this is a GC optimization pattern!

4. **String Operations**:
   - FreeGameUIManager: string concatenation in tween onUpdate callback (round counter)
   - BSSpineCtrl: dynamic animation name construction with prefix concatenation
   - Audio clip names constructed with template literals in loops

5. **Event System**:
   - Heavy use of eventManager.Dispatch with string event names
   - OnEvent handlers spreading arguments unnecessarily

6. **Spine Animation**:
   - setEventListener, setCompleteListener patterns with multiple animation state tracking

7. **Object Pooling**:
   - AddSpinFlyEffect demonstrates good pooling with PrefabPoolManager
   - Particle system cleanup (stop, clear, resetSystem)

Key optimization opportunities identified:
- Coordinate conversion helpers called frequently could cache results
- Array.map() creating new arrays in hot paths
- String concatenation in animation callbacks
- Dynamic string construction for animation names
- Tween callbacks with closures capturing context
- Promise creation overhead in tight loops

```xml
<observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>Hot Path Performance Bottlenecks and GC Optimization Opportunities Identified</title>
  <subtitle>Analysis reveals coordinate conversion overhead, allocation patterns in game states, and string operations in animation loops</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>SlotReels.ts coordinate helpers GetColRowFromPosition and GetPositionFromColRow called 65+ times across codebase with per-call loop iterations through columns</fact>
    <fact>ConvertSymbolsToSymbolInfos allocates new SymbolInfo objects via Array.map in hot paths during spin updates and tile matching</fact>
    <fact>CountMultState implements GC optimization pattern with class-level _posOwnerMap reused across turns via clear() instead of new Map()</fact>
    <fact>String concatenation occurs in FreeGameUIManager tween onUpdate callback for round counter display during count-up animation</fact>
    <fact>BSSpineCtrl constructs animation names dynamically with H_ or S_ prefix concatenation in Play method hot path</fact>
    <fact>TileMatchingAndPatchUp creates multiple closures per symbol in Promise array with captured state for tween callbacks</fact>
    <fact>Audio clip names constructed with template literals in loops across ExplodeState, CountMultState, and ScatterShowState</fact>
    <fact>MatchingPatchUpState ComputeVisibleBaseSymbols creates new Set and Array for each cascade iteration with string key generation</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>
Deep analysis of game loop hot paths identified several GC and performance optimization opportunities across the slot game's state machine and reel mechanics. The 4032-line SlotReels.ts core contains coordinate conversion helpers (GetColRowFromPosition, GetPositionFromColRow) called 65+ times, each iterating through columns to convert between 1D position indices and 2D col/row coordinates—no result caching detected. The ConvertSymbolsToSymbolInfos method allocates fresh SymbolInfo arrays via map() during spin updates, tile matching, and cascade fills. Positive finding: CountMultState demonstrates awareness of GC pressure by reusing a class-level Map (_posOwnerMap) across game turns, calling clear() instead of allocating new Maps—this pattern should be replicated elsewhere. String operations appear in animation hot paths: FreeGameUIManager performs concatenation in tween onUpdate callbacks during round counter display, BSSpineCtrl constructs animation names with prefix concatenation every Play() call, and multiple state classes build audio clip names with template literals in loops. TileMatchingAndPatchUp's tile matching logic creates arrays of Promises with closures capturing col/row/symbol state for each moving symbol's tween callback. The event system (eventManager) uses string-based dispatch with argument spreading throughout, though this is likely acceptable overhead for the loose coupling benefits. Coordinate conversions, symbol info allocation, and string construction in loops represent the highest-impact optimization targets.
  </narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
    <concept>problem-solution</concept>
    <concept>gotcha</concept>
    <concept>pattern</concept>
  </concepts>
  <files_read>

    <file>assets/Script/GameState/UnshowPrepareState.ts</file>
    <file>assets/Script/GameState/FreePickRouletteState.ts</file>
    <file>assets/Script/WantedPoster/WantedPosterItem.ts</file>
  </files_read>

</observation>
