[];\\n    list.push(handler);\\n    this.handlers.set(key, list);\\n  }\\n\\n  /** 註冊特定 action 類型的 handler */\\n  onAction(action: EventAction, handler: EventHandler): void {\\n    const list = this.actionHandlers.get(action) ?? [];\\n    list.push(handler);\\n    this.actionHandlers.set(action, list);\\n  }\\n\\n  /** 派發事件（由 player 呼叫） */\\n  /** 派發事件（由 player 呼叫）。index < 0 表示不做防重複（如 spine event） */\\n  emit(event: EventData, index: number): void {\\n    if (index >= 0) {\\n      if (this.firedSet.has(index)) return;\\n      this.firedSet.add(index);\\n    }\\n\\n    // key-specific handlers\\n    const keyHandlers = this.handlers.get(event.key);\\n    if (keyHandlers) keyHandlers.forEach((h) => h(event));\\n\\n    // action-type handlers\\n    const actHandlers = this.actionHandlers.get(event.action);\\n    if (actHandlers) actHandlers.forEach((h) => h(event));\\n  }\\n\\n  /** 重置（timeline 重播時呼叫） */\\n  reset(): void {\\n    this.firedSet.clear();\\n  }\\n\\n  /** 清除所有 handler */\\n  clear(): void {\\n    this.handlers.clear();\\n    this.actionHandlers.clear();\\n    this.firedSet.clear();\\n  }\\n}\\n\",\"numLines\":56,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":56}}"</outcome>

Runtime 呼叫 play(index) 或 playByName(name)\\n */\\nimport { _decorator, Component, Node, TextAsset, director, Layers } from \\\"cc\\\";\\nimport { TimelinePlayer, ClipChangeInfo, PlayerCallbacks } from \\\"./TimelinePlayer\\\";\\nimport { TimelineAsset, EventAction, EventData, TrackData, PlayState } from \\\"./TimelineData\\\";\\n\\ndeclare const CC_EDITOR: boolean;\\n\\nconst { ccclass, property, executeInEditMode } = _decorator;\\n\\n/** 序列化用：trackId → targets 陣列的 index */\\ninterface TrackMapping { trackId: string; targetIndex: number; }\\n\\n@ccclass(\\\"TimelineExecutor\\\")\\n@executeInEditMode\\nexport class TimelineExecutor extends Component {\\n  @property({ type: [TextAsset] })\\n  timelines: TextAsset[] = [];\\n\\n  @property([Node])\\n  targets: Node[] = [];\\n\\n  @property({ visible: false })\\n  private _trackMap: string = \\\"[]\\\"; // JSON string of TrackMapping[]\\n\\n  private player = new TimelinePlayer();\\n  private trackNodeMap = new Map<string, Node>();\\n\\n  onLoad() {\\n    if (CC_EDITOR) this._autoBindTargets();\\n  }\\n\\n  /** 播放第 N 個 timeline */\\n  play(index: number = 0): void {\\n    if (index >= this.timelines.length) { console.warn(`[Executor] No timeline at index ${index}`); return; }\\n    this.playTimeline(JSON.parse(this.timelines[index].text!) as TimelineAsset);\\n  }\\n\\n  /** 用 name 播放 */\\n  playByName(name: string): void {\\n    for (const t of this.timelines) {\\n      if (!t) continue;\\n      const asset = JSON.parse(t.text!) as TimelineAsset;\\n      if (asset.name === name) { this.playTimeline(asset); return; }\\n    }\\n    console.warn(`[Executor] Timeline \\\"${name}\\\" not found`);\\n  }\\n\\n  /** 直接傳入 asset 播放 */\\n  playTimeline(asset: TimelineAsset): void {\\n    this.buildTrackNodeMap(asset);\\n    this.player.load(asset, this.buildCallbacks());\\n    this.registerBuiltinActions();\\n    this.player.play();\\n  }\\n\\n  emitSignal(signalId: string): void { this.player.emitSignal(signalId); }\\n  stopTimeline(): void { this.player.stop(); }\\n  onEvent(key: string, handler: (event: EventData) => void): void { this.player.eventBus.on(key, handler); }\\n\\n  get isPlaying(): boolean { return this.player.state === PlayState.Playing; }\\n\\n  update(dt: number): void {\\n    if (this.player.state === PlayState.Playing) {\\n      this.player.tick(dt);\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  // ─── Editor Auto-Bind ──────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n  private _autoBindTargets(): void {\\n    const scene = director.getScene() as unknown as Node;\\n    if (!scene) return;\\n\\n    const nodeMap = new Map<string, { node: Node; index: number }>(); // uuid → { node, index in targets }\\n    const newTargets: Node[] = [];\\n    const mappings: TrackMapping[] = [];\\n\\n    for (const textAsset of this.timelines) {\\n      if (!textAsset) continue;\\n      const asset = JSON.parse(textAsset.text!) as any;\\n      if (!asset?.tracks) continue;\\n\\n      for (const track of asset.tracks) {\\n        const uuid = track.targetUuid;\\n        if (!uuid) continue;\\n\\n        // 同一個 uuid 只存一次（多個 track 可能指向同一個節點）\\n        if (!nodeMap.has(uuid)) {\\n          const node = this._findByUuid(scene, uuid);\\n          if (node) {\\n            const idx = newTargets.length;\\n            newTargets.push(node);\\n            nodeMap.set(uuid, { node, index: idx });\\n          } else {\\n            console.warn(`[Executor] Auto-bind: uuid \\\"${uuid}\\\" not found (track \\\"${track.id}\\\")`);\\n            continue;\\n          }\\n        }\\n        mappings.push({ trackId: track.id, targetIndex: nodeMap.get(uuid)!.index });\\n      }\\n    }\\n\\n    this.targets = newTargets;\\n    this._trackMap = JSON.stringify(mappings);\\n    console.log(`[Executor] Auto-bound ${newTargets.length} targets, ${mappings.length} track mappings`);\\n  }\\n\\n  private _findByUuid(root: Node, uuid: string): Node | null {\\n    if ((root as any).uuid === uuid) return root;\\n    for (const child of root.children) {\\n      const found = this._findByUuid(child, uuid);\\n      if (found) return found;\\n    }\\n    return null;\\n  }\\n\\n  // ─── Built-in Event Actions ─────────────────────────────────\\n\\n  private registerBuiltinActions(): void {\\n    const actions: EventAction[] = [\\\"change_layer\\\", \\\"set_active\\\", \\\"set_scale\\\", \\\"play_anim\\\"];\\n    for (const action of actions) {\\n      this.player.eventBus.onAction(action, (ev) => this.handleEvent(ev));\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  /**\\n   * 內建 action 自動執行。params 約定：\\n   * - target: trackId (string) 指定目標節點\\n   * - change_layer: { target, layer: number }\\n   * - set_active:   { target, active: boolean }\\n   * - set_scale:    { target, x?, y?, z? } (預設 1)\\n   * - play_anim:    { target, anim: string, trackIndex?: number, loop?: boolean }\\n   */\\n  private handleEvent(ev: EventData): void {\\n    const node = this.resolveEventTarget(ev);\\n    if (!node) { console.warn(`[Executor] Event \\\"${ev.key}\\\": target not found`); return; }\\n\\n    const p = ev.params;\\n    switch (ev.action) {\\n      case \\\"change_layer\\\":\\n        node.layer = (p.layer as number) ?? Layers.Enum.DEFAULT;\\n        break;\\n      case \\\"set_active\\\":\\n        node.active = (p.active as boolean) ?? true;\\n        break;\\n      case \\\"set_scale\\\":\\n        node.setScale(\\n          (p.x as number) ?? node.scale.x,\\n          (p.y as number) ?? node.scale.y,\\n          (p.z as number) ?? node.scale.z,\\n        );\\n        break;\\n      case \\\"play_anim\\\": {\\n        const skeleton = node.getComponent(\\\"sp.Skeleton\\\") as any;\\n        if (skeleton) {\\n          skeleton.setAnimation((p.trackIndex as number) ?? 0, p.anim as string, (p.loop as boolean) ?? false);\\n        } else {\\n          const anim = node.getComponent(\\\"cc.Animation\\\") as any;\\n          if (anim) anim.play(p.anim as string);\\n        }\\n        break;\\n      }\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  private resolveEventTarget(ev: EventData): Node | null {\\n    const target = ev.params.target as string | number | undefined;\\n    if (target == null) return null;\\n    // number → targets 陣列 index\\n    if (typeof target === \\\"number\\\") return this.targets[target] ?? null;\\n    // string → 先查 trackId，再查 targetPath\\n    const byTrack = this.trackNodeMap.get(target);\\n    if (byTrack) return byTrack;\\n    // fallback: 遍歷 trackNodeMap 的 node.name 或用 find\\n    for (const [, node] of this.trackNodeMap) {\\n      if (node.name === target) return node;\\n    }\\n    return null;\\n  }\\n\\n  // ─── Runtime ───────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n  private buildTrackNodeMap(asset: TimelineAsset): void {\\n    this.trackNodeMap.clear();\\n    const mappings: TrackMapping[] = JSON.parse(this._trackMap || \\\"[]\\\");\\n    for (const track of asset.tracks) {\\n      const m = mappings.find((x) => x.trackId === track.id);\\n      if (m && m.targetIndex < this.targets.length && this.targets[m.targetIndex]) {\\n        this.trackNodeMap.set(track.id, this.targets[m.targetIndex]);\\n      }\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  private buildCallbacks(): PlayerCallbacks {\\n    return {\\n      onClipStart: (info) => this.handleClipStart(info),\\n      onClipEnd: (info) => this.handleClipEnd(info),\\n      onFinished: () => this.node.emit(\\\"timeline-finished\\\"),\\n    };\\n  }\\n\\n  private handleClipStart(info: ClipChangeInfo): void {\\n    const targetNode = this.trackNodeMap.get(info.track.id);\\n    if (!targetNode) { console.warn(`[Executor] No target for track \\\"${info.track.id}\\\"`); return; }\\n\\n    if (info.track.scriptName) {\\n      const comp = targetNode.getComponent(info.track.scriptName) as any;\\n      if (comp && typeof comp.onTimelineClip === \\\"function\\\") {\\n        comp.onTimelineClip(info.clip.name, info.clip);\\n      }\\n    }\\n\\n    switch (info.track.type) {\\n      case \\\"spine\\\": {\\n        const skeleton = targetNode.getComponent(\\\"sp.Skeleton\\\") as any;\\n        if (!skeleton) break;\\n        skeleton.setAnimation(info.clip.trackIndex ?? 0, info.clip.name, info.clip.loop ?? false);\\n        if (info.clip.duration === 0) {\\n          const anim = skeleton.findAnimation?.(info.clip.name);\\n          if (anim?.duration > 0) info.clip.duration = anim.duration;\\n        }\\n        // Forward Spine animation events to eventBus\\n        skeleton.setEventListener?.((trackEntry: any, event: any) => {\\n          this.player.eventBus.emit(\\n            { time: 0, key: event.data?.name || event.name || \\\"\\\", action: \\\"custom\\\", params: { source: \\\"spine\\\", track: info.track.id, event } },\\n            -1, // index < 0 = no dedup (spine events can fire multiple times)\\n          );\\n        });\\n        break;\\n      }\\n      case \\\"node\\\": {\\n        const anim = targetNode.getComponent(\\\"cc.Animation\\\") as any;\\n        if (anim) anim.play(info.clip.name);\\n        break;\\n      }\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  private handleClipEnd(info: ClipChangeInfo): void {\\n    if (info.clip.stopOnEnd && info.track.type === \\\"spine\\\") {\\n      const targetNode = this.trackNodeMap.get(info.track.id);\\n      if (targetNode) {\\n        const skeleton = targetNode.getComponent(\\\"sp.Skeleton\\\") as any;\\n        if (skeleton) { skeleton.clearTrack(info.clip.trackIndex ?? 0); skeleton.setToSetupPose(); }\\n      }\\n    }\\n  }\\n}\\n\",\"numLines\":257,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":257}}"</outcome>

<summary>
  <request>GC and Performance Optimization Analysis for Cocos Creator Slot Game (Read-Only Review)</request>
  <investigated>Comprehensive code analysis across 20+ TypeScript files in the uk_pirates_queen Cocos Creator project, focusing on core game loop systems: SlotReels.ts (4032-line reel mechanics), state machine classes (SpinState, ExplodeState, CountMultState, WantedPosterState, etc.), UI managers (FreeGameUIManager, WantedPosterManager, BSSpineCtrl), animation systems (FGRouletteManager, AddSpinFlyEffect), and event/timeline infrastructure. Analysis targeted hot paths, allocation patterns, string operations, coordinate conversions, and pooling strategies.</investigated>
  <learned>Key performance patterns identified: (1) GetColRowFromPosition/GetPositionFromColRow coordinate helpers called 65+ times with per-call column iteration loops—no result caching detected, (2) ConvertSymbolsToSymbolInfos allocates fresh SymbolInfo arrays via map() during spin updates and tile matching, (3) String concatenation occurs in tween onUpdate callbacks (round counter display) and animation name construction (H_/S_ prefix in BSSpineCtrl Play method), (4) CountMultState demonstrates GC awareness by reusing class-level _posOwnerMap via clear() instead of allocating new Maps—this pattern should be replicated elsewhere, (5) FreeGameUIManager already implements Vec3 constant reuse (SCALE_BOUNCE, SCALE_NORMAL) to avoid allocations in scale tweens, (6) AddSpinFlyEffect properly implements object pooling with PrefabPoolManager and explicit particle cleanup (stop, clear, resetSystem), (7) TileMatchingAndPatchUp creates Promise arrays with closures capturing col/row/symbol state for each moving symbol's tween callback, (8) Audio clip names constructed with template literals in state machine loops across multiple classes.</learned>
  <completed>Initial discovery phase completed with three major observation records documenting: (1) Core system architecture and performance patterns across SlotReels, UI managers, and animation controllers, (2) String operation bottlenecks and allocation patterns in animation hot paths, (3) Hot path coordinate conversion overhead, symbol info allocation in game loop, and closure creation in tile matching. Identified CountMultState's Map reuse pattern as best practice example for GC optimization. No code modifications made per user requirement for read-only analysis.</completed>
  <next_steps>Continuing background analysis of remaining game systems: state machine transitions (EnterFreeState, LeaveFreeState, AddFreeState), timeline execution framework (TimelineExecutor event handling and clip management), effect plate spine lifecycle management, and event system overhead patterns. Next phase will consolidate findings into categorized optimization recommendations: high-impact (coordinate conversion caching, string operation reduction), medium-impact (symbol info pooling, closure reduction), and quick wins (replicate Map reuse pattern, template literal caching).</next_steps>

content.thinking:
The user is asking me to observe tool executions from a primary session and create observations. I've been receiving reads and greps of the SlotReels.ts file, focusing on:

1. GetFakeReelRandomSymbol - gets random symbols from fake reel, uses eventManager.Dispatch
2. GetColumn - helper that retrieves a ColumnSymbol from m_allColumns array
3. GetSymbolNodeFromColRow, GetSymbolSingleCellFromColRow - coordinate-based accessors that call GetColumn

Key findings:
- GetColumn is called frequently and does bounds checking every time
- GetFakeReelRandomSymbol uses eventManager.Dispatch with a callback pattern (synchronous callback in the same call)
- Multiple accessors (GetSymbolNodeFromColRow, GetSymbolSingleCellFromColRow, GetSingleCellFromColRow) all call GetColumn first

This is additional evidence of:
1. Event system overhead - using Dispatch even for synchronous data retrieval (FAKE_REEL_MANAGER_EVENT.GET_RANDOM_SYMBOL)
2. Repeated bounds checking in GetColumn on every accessor call
3. No caching of frequently accessed nodes/cells

I should create an observation about these accessor patterns and event system usage patterns.

```xml
<observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>Event System Overhead and Accessor Pattern Analysis in SlotReels</title>
  <subtitle>Synchronous event dispatch for data retrieval and repeated bounds checking in column accessors identified as optimization opportunities</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>GetFakeReelRandomSymbol uses eventManager.Dispatch with FAKE_REEL_MANAGER_EVENT.GET_RANDOM_SYMBOL passing callback for synchronous return value instead of direct function call</fact>
    <fact>GetColumn performs bounds checking on every invocation: validates m_allColumns array, col range check, middlePlateIndex range check</fact>
    <fact>GetSymbolNodeFromColRow, GetSymbolSingleCellFromColRow, and GetSingleCellFromColRow all call GetColumn as first step, multiplying bounds check overhead</fact>
    <fact>eventManager.Dispatch called 21 times in SlotReels.ts including WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.PLAY_OUT_ALL and REEL_UI_MANAGER_SET_ALL_SYMBOL_BLACK_MASK_SHOW</fact>
    <fact>GetColumn returns early with null on invalid input but performs three separate validation checks before returning column reference</fact>
    <fact>TileMatchingAndPatchUp calls GetSymbolSingleCellFromColRow in tight loop during cascade fill logic</fact>
    <fact>Fake reel system uses three sequential event dispatches: GET_RANDOM_SEED, GET_DATA_LENGTH, GET_RANDOM_SYMBOL with callbacks for each</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>
Analysis of accessor and event system patterns in SlotReels.ts reveals two categories of overhead: (1) Event system used for synchronous data retrieval where direct method calls would suffice—GetFakeReelRandomSymbol dispatches FAKE_REEL_MANAGER_EVENT.GET_RANDOM_SYMBOL with a callback that executes immediately and returns symbolId, adding dispatch overhead (string comparison, handler lookup, callback invocation) for what is conceptually a getter; (2) Repeated bounds checking in column accessor chain—GetColumn validates array existence, column index bounds, and middlePlateIndex on every call, then three higher-level accessors (GetSymbolNodeFromColRow, GetSymbolSingleCellFromColRow, GetSingleCellFromColRow) all call GetColumn as their first step, multiplying the validation cost. In hot paths like TileMatchingAndPatchUp's tile matching loop, GetSymbolSingleCellFromColRow is called once per moving symbol with full validation overhead. The fake reel system compounds this with sequential event dispatches for seed, length, and symbol retrieval. While eventManager provides loose coupling benefits for true cross-component communication, using it for local data access within the same gameplay frame adds unnecessary overhead. Optimization opportunities: (1) convert synchronous event-based getters to direct method calls or cached lookups, (2) cache column references after validation to skip repeated bounds checks, (3) consider inline validation in hot path accessors to avoid GetColumn indirection.
  </narrative>

  </concepts>
```
